'''Maria Brill''' worked in the Visual Effects department and her likeness was used as the [[Hologram|holographic]] image of [[Shaak Ti]], which was the only [[canon]]ical appearance of the character in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].

Brill is currently the Director of Virtual Production Operations at [[Industrial Light & Magic]]. She manages StageCraft operations worldwide.<ref name="ILM" /> In [[2021]], she handled visual effects for ''[[Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett]]''.<ref name="Stranger" />
